name: Nigeria Police Force — National Public Relations
role: National Police spokesperson and public complaints channel
notes: For reporting police misconduct; also contact your State Command PRO.

name: Kwara State Police Command
notes: Report roadside harassment or unlawful search; ask for PRO desk.

name: National Human Rights Commission
notes: File complaints on unlawful arrest, search, or detention.

name: Legal Aid Council of Nigeria
role: Free legal assistance for eligible citizens
notes: Apply if you cannot afford a private lawyer.

name: Nigerian Bar Association — Ilorin Branch
role: Referral to qualified lawyers in Kwara
notes: Contact for private legal representation referrals.

name: Kwara State Ministry of Housing and Urban Development
role: Land administration, consent, and registry matters
notes: Conduct land searches and verify State land records in Ilorin.

name: Federal Ministry of Housing and Urban Development
role: Federal housing policy and related inquiries
notes: For federal housing programmes; land title is primarily State jurisdiction.

name: Kwara State Ministry of Justice
role: State legal matters and public guidance
notes: State-level legal information and civil dispute guidance.

name: Police Service Commission
role: Oversight and discipline of police officers
notes: Formal complaints against police officers beyond initial PRO report.

name: Citizen Mediation / Small Claims Guidance
notes: Document all rent payments; seek Legal Aid or NBA referral before court.
